content.en:
Archean Plains boundary.

Those Dao Ancestors of the Ancient Dao Alliance also knew about the turmoil of the antiquities, and their expressions were extremely solemn.

Moreover, they quickly contacted other Dao Ancestors and confirmed the authenticity of this matter.

After all, the antiquities turmoil was a very short period of time from the beginning to the time it covered the boundaries of this area, so it has now spread and is easy to prove.

"Next, we can't enter the Silent Black Sea anymore, and we must strictly prevent special primordial artifacts from sneaking into our primeval realm from the Silent Black Sea!"

Those Dao Ancestors of the Ancient Dao Alliance thought to themselves.

Although there was a reminder of this antiquity turmoil, and many Dao Ancestors knew about it in advance, some Dao Ancestors were in a hurry in the Silent Black Sea and did not enter the district boundary at the first time, so they died instantly.

Therefore, the number of Dao Ancestors who fell this time still reached several.

......

When the antiquities turmoil came, all the Dao Ancestors stayed at the boundary of the district with peace of mind, and so did Ye Tian.

His other copy body wasn't even ready to come back, so he stayed in that realm and directly began his retreat cultivation, using the last of the primordial ancient liquid to impact the sixfold primordial ancestor peak realm.

this day.

There was a slight change in the boundary of the primeval plains, and a black aura actually dissolved the barriers of the primeval realms, forming a crack that drilled in through the crack.

At first, the Dao Ancestors of the Ancient Dao Alliance didn't notice this.

But after this black aura directly wiped out the original domains, it naturally attracted the attention of the Ancient Dao Alliance.

Airplanes!!!!

A venerable Dao Ancestor surrounded this black aura.

They recognized it, and it was clearly an original antiquity.

However, they did not know the origin of this primordial artifact.

Thundered!!!!

The Dao Ancestors kept attacking, but they still couldn't kill this primordial artifact.

"It's not good, this primordial artifact is at most comparable to the Dao Ancestor in the middle stage of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, but it is formless and substantial, and it is too difficult to kill!"

At this time, Ye Tian arrived.

Airplanes!

A golden light came, directly killing this primordial artifact in seconds.

"Thank you Endless Dao Ancestor!"

One Dao Ancestor thanked him.

"Small things, if there are still primordial artifacts that can't be solved, you can just notify me!" Ye Tian finished speaking and left directly.

"The strength of the Endless Dao Ancestor is getting more and more terrifying!"

A Dao Ancestor said with emotion.

"This is a good thing for us, at least this antiquity turmoil, our primeval realm realm will not be in any great danger! and if some weak realms are unlucky, all the creatures in the entire realm will be destroyed by the primordial antiquities, and the reincarnation of the realm will be restarted!" said another Dao Ancestor.

"Let's go, be careful during this time, by the way, send some Fivefold Dao Ancestors, let them patrol one more circle, and definitely not let any of the primordial artifacts wreak havoc!"

Immediately, these Dao Ancestors went back one by one.

Time flies, and a period of time has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian finally completed the final breakthrough using the primordial ancient liquid.

Sixfold Origin Ancestor Peak Realm!

Ye Tian broke through to this level!

......

"The current strength is much stronger than in the past, and I can now use the Yuan Dao Refining Technique to refine my body and impact the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Of course, even if the cultivation reached the peak of the sixfold primordial ancestor and comprehended the endless yuan dao, if you want to break through to the half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor realm, it is not possible to break through all at once.

The cultivation of the Yuan Dao Quenching Technique is also carried out slowly and takes a long time.

But in the process, his body will become stronger and stronger, and his strength will gradually increase.

"Let's try to use the Endless Yuan Dao to refine the body first!"

Ye Tian manipulated the power of the Ninefold Yuan Dao, the Endless Yuan Dao.

Airplanes!!!

Under the effect of the Yuan Dao Quenching Technique, the power of the Endless Yuan Dao is constantly refining the physical body, and the physical body that has been unable to progress and has reached the limit is now beginning to progress again, although the speed of progress is not fast, but it is also improving!

"According to the inheritance, use the Yuan Dao Quenching Technique to continuously temper, and when you perceive a certain boundary, break it, and you will become a half-step sevenfold ancestor. But the boundaries of each Dao Ancestor are different, but when you reach the boundary, you have a feeling. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't know when his limit would come, so he silently tempered it like this and enjoyed the happiness of improving his strength.

During this period, the primordial realm also encountered several invasions of primordial antiquities, but all of them were resolved and did not cause any trouble to the primordial realm boundary.

......

"Xuanqing Dao Ancestor, they invited me to explore the Dark Ancient Lair!"

Ye Tian also knew that the Dark Ancient Nest used to be called the Dark Zone Boundary, but there was once a big war, which caused the Dark Ancient Lair to be completely shattered, and the degree of fragmentation even surpassed the Shattered Void Zone Boundary.

But in the years that followed, an incomparably large ancient nest spawned from the place where the Dark Zone boundary was located.

Since then, the Dark Ancient Lair has become a forbidden land, and even a half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor level Dao Ancestor does not dare to enter the Dark Ancient Lair.

Because of the large ancient nest like the Dark Ancient Nest, it has a great suppression of the half-step sevenfold original ancestor, and there are too many primordial artifacts inside.

Therefore, the half-step sevenfold ancestor did not dare to enter it, otherwise he would not be able to escape.

Silent Black Sea.

Ye Tian and Xuanqing Dao Ancestor and a total of thirteen Dao Ancestors gathered together.

There is also a small group between Dao Ancestor and Dao Ancestor, and the small group of Xuanqing Dao Ancestor is now inviting Ye Tian, which can be regarded as wanting to win over Ye Tian.

After all, Ye Tian's potential is very great, and what he condenses is the Ninefold Dao Fruit, as long as he does not fall in the future, he will surpass them.

That's why they wanted to win Ye Tian in.

After Ye Tian greeted these twelve Dao Ancestors, he began to discuss the matter of entering the Dark Ancient Lair.

At this time, Xuanqing Dao Ancestor said: "Fellow Dao Ancestors, now that the Antiquities Turmoil has just ended, during this period of time, the Primordial Antiquities rarely appear, and the Primordial Antiquities of the Dark Ancient Nest will also be very few. The most important thing is that the Dark Lair will not be suppressed for a period of time, and after we enter the Dark Lair, we can burst out with all our strength. We don't know why this is the case, but it's the only chance. Not only we, Dao Ancestors, will enter, but other Dao Ancestors who have reached the level of half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestors will also enter. "

"Xuanqing Dao Ancestor, I have never entered the Dark Ancient Lair, what good things are in it?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor smiled and said, "There are a lot of good things inside the Dark Ancient Nest, for example, the Golden Branch Void Fruit you got from the Qingfeng Dao Ancestor before was found inside the Dark Ancient Nest. At the beginning, a total of eighteen Golden Branch Void Fruits were found, and these Golden Branch Void Fruits grew on the Golden Branch Void Tree, and now that Golden Branch Void Tree should have given birth to a new Golden Branch Void Fruit. Of course, the Golden Branch Void Fruit is nothing, and the real good thing inside the Dark Ancient Lair is the Dark Bluestone Liquid!"
